intelligence.title: AU marketplace consolidation — Catch/MyDeal gone, global players dominate
intelligence.detail: Amazon 60% AU reach, Temu $2.6B AU sales, 47% penetration. Amazon launched Haul AU. Fewer local marketplaces.

intelligence.title: AU consumers frustrated with broken price tracking
intelligence.detail: CamelCamelCamel often incorrect for Amazon AU. Keepa worse. PriceHipster lost Coles. Woolies missing from all services.

intelligence.title: B2B competitor monitoring market hits $710M, projected $1.4B by 2033
intelligence.detail: Tools cost $100-$1000/mo. Key players: Prisync, Price2Spy, Competera, Intelligence Node, DataWeave.

intelligence.title: Prisync/Price2Spy users complain: scraping errors, clunky UX, hostile cancellation
Only 12% trust Temu quality despite 47% penetration
intelligence.detail: Massive trust gap. Consumers buy on price but don't trust quality.

intelligence.title: PriceAPI, Price.com, Sovrn offer pricing data APIs — none AU-focused
US competitor monitoring gap: enterprise tools $1K+/mo, SMBs underserved
AI-driven dynamic repricing becoming table stakes
AU e-commerce $43.6B, growing 21.87% CAGR to $108B by 2030

summary: AU e-commerce consolidating around global players. SellWisely enters $710M market with documented competitor pain points. PricesAPI has defensible niche — no competing API focuses on AU retail data.
